title: Create: Foundry
description: Use your Create skills and machines to create the ultimate ore processor!
body:
# Create: Foundry
[![CurseForge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-foundry)
[![Modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/createfoundry)

![Forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/supported/forge_vector.svg)
![Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/supported/fabric_vector.svg)

Use your Create skills to build the ultimate ore processor! Melt down your ores and mould them into ingots! Or compress your leftover coal into fresh diamonds! This mod has it all!

## Modpack Makers
Feel free to use this in any modpack!

## To Do:
Here are some feature of this mod that will be added in the near future:
- New ways to forge tools
- Lapis, Carbon, and Emerald Tools
- Brass and Zinc tools
- Paxels?

Got anymore suggestions? Let us know on Github!
